message:
Update beads issue tracking with implementation progress

This commit synchronizes the beads issue tracker with the completed
implementation work:

Status Changes:
- 3s8.4: closed - Request CLI commands (run, request, status, pending, cancel)
- 3s8.5: in_progress - Context attachments implementation
- 7js.1: closed - Unit tests for pattern matching
- rjs: in_progress - Different-model requirement timeout escalation
- tzt: closed - Analytics/learning mode with execution outcomes

Previously Completed (referenced in earlier commits):
- jrn.2: Review core logic
- jrn.3: Review CLI commands (review.go, approve.go, reject.go)
- kb5.1: Command execution core logic (execute.go, command.go)
- kb5.2: Execute CLI commands (execute.go, emergency.go, rollback.go)

This update reflects the multi-agent development effort with various
agents working on different beads in parallel, coordinating via
MCP Agent Mail.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.1","content_hash":"a5ed0fb46ca799f0dd37ffeeed7b1345b2fee6c052cf601897dceb2c19c36daf","title":"Implement pattern matching engine with command normalization","description":"## Task
Implement the pattern matching engine that classifies commands into risk tiers.

## Core Functions (internal/core/patterns.go)

### ClassifyCommand(cmd string, cwd string) (RiskTier, *MatchResult)
- Normalize command
- Check tiers in order: SAFE → CRITICAL → DANGEROUS → CAUTION
- Return tier and match details

### NormalizeCommand(cmd string) (*NormalizedCommand, error)
- Parse with shell-aware tokenizer
- Extract primary command from wrappers: sudo, doas, env, command, builtin, time, nice, ionice, nohup
- Detect compound commands (;, &&, ||, |, subshells)
- If any segment matches tier, whole command is at least that tier
- If parsing fails, fall back to raw regex and upgrade tier by one step

### MatchPattern(pattern, cmd string) bool
- Regex matching, case-insensitive by default
- Handle special characters

### ResolvePathsInCommand(cmd, cwd string) string
- Expand relative paths (./,../) to absolute
- Used for path-aware patterns

## Pattern Precedence
1. Check SAFE patterns → skip review entirely
2. Check CRITICAL → highest risk
3. Check DANGEROUS
4. Check CAUTION
5. No match → allowed without review

## Match Result
- Tier
- MatchedPattern
- MinApprovals
- NeedsApproval (bool)

## Files
- internal/core/patterns.go
- internal/core/normalize.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Commands correctly classified
- [ ] sudo/env wrappers stripped
- [ ] Compound commands detected
- [ ] Paths resolved correctly
- [ ] Case-insensitive matching","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:09.132220861-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:39:45.690271534-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:39:45.690271534-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-f5d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:31:34.904807286-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.2","content_hash":"2c9dfc5d8d592835573ae38884c0116112f484e2698979430d451e53b352bb2e","title":"Define default dangerous patterns","description":"## Task
Define the default pattern sets for each risk tier as specified in the plan.

## Pattern Categories (internal/config/patterns.go)

### CRITICAL (2+ approvals required)
File System:
- ^rm\s+-rf\s+/(?!tmp) - rm -rf / (but not /tmp)
- ^rm\s+-rf\s+~ - rm -rf ~

Databases:
- DROP\s+DATABASE
- DROP\s+SCHEMA
- TRUNCATE\s+TABLE
- DELETE\s+FROM\s+[\w.`"[\]]+\s*($|;|--|/\*) - DELETE without WHERE

Kubernetes:
- ^kubectl\s+delete\s+(node|namespace|pv|pvc)
- ^helm\s+uninstall.*--all

Cloud:
- ^terraform\s+destroy(?!.*-target) - terraform destroy without -target
- ^aws\s+.*terminate-instances
- ^gcloud.*delete.*--quiet

Git:
- ^git\s+push.*--force(?!-with-lease) - force push (not with-lease)

Containers:
- ^docker\s+system\s+prune\s+-a

### DANGEROUS (1 approval required)
- ^rm\s+-rf, ^rm\s+-r
- ^git\s+reset\s+--hard, ^git\s+clean\s+-fd
- ^git\s+push.*--force-with-lease
- ^kubectl\s+delete
- ^helm\s+uninstall
- ^docker\s+rm, ^docker\s+rmi
- ^terraform\s+destroy.*-target
- ^terraform\s+state\s+rm
- DROP\s+TABLE
- DELETE\s+FROM.*WHERE
- ^chmod\s+-R, ^chown\s+-R

### CAUTION (auto-approved after 30s)
- ^rm\s+[^-] - rm without flags
- ^git\s+stash\s+drop
- ^git\s+branch\s+-[dD]
- ^npm\s+uninstall, ^pip\s+uninstall, ^cargo\s+remove

### SAFE (skip review)
- ^rm\s+.*\.log$, ^rm\s+.*\.tmp$, ^rm\s+.*\.bak$
- ^git\s+stash(?!.*drop)
- ^kubectl\s+delete\s+pod
- ^npm\s+cache\s+clean

## Files
- internal/config/patterns.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All default patterns defined
- [ ] Patterns compile as valid regex
- [ ] Tier configuration includes min_approvals
- [ ] Patterns documented with comments","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:28.276069017-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:41:57.821202644-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:41:57.821202644-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.2","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:28.277216995-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.3","content_hash":"8b8471d65fa1ae5c5f1fcc23834ffd8b2fe52ab283d07a1bc536cd16da910d25","title":"Implement pattern CLI commands","description":"## Task
Implement CLI commands for pattern management.

## Commands (internal/cli/patterns.go)

### slb patterns list
- Flags: --tier
- Lists all patterns grouped by tier
- JSON: { critical: [], dangerous: [], caution: [], safe: [] }

### slb patterns test "<command>"
- Alias: slb check "<command>"
- Flags: --exit-code (return non-zero if approval needed)
- Shows which tier command matches
- JSON: { needs_approval, tier, min_approvals, matched_pattern }

### slb patterns add
- Flags: --tier (required), --reason
- Positional: pattern
- Agents CAN add patterns freely
- Records in pattern_changes and custom_patterns tables
- JSON: { pattern, tier, added_by, added_at }

### slb patterns remove
- BLOCKED for agents
- Returns exit code 1 with JSON error
- Message: "Pattern removal requires human approval. Use slb tui."

### slb patterns request-removal
- Flags: --reason (required)
- Positional: pattern
- Creates pending removal request for human review
- JSON: { request_id, pattern, status: "pending" }

### slb patterns suggest
- Flags: --tier, --reason
- Like add but marks as "suggested" for human review
- Human can promote or dismiss in TUI

## Exit Codes
- 0: No approval needed (or pattern added successfully)
- 1: Approval needed (for --exit-code), or error
- Exit code used by Claude Code hooks

## Files
- internal/cli/patterns.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] patterns test correctly identifies tier
- [ ] patterns add works for agents
- [ ] patterns remove blocked for agents
- [ ] --exit-code flag works for hooks integration","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:46.79971591-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:57:56.092395921-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:57:56.092395921-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:46.800746821-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:46.801681943-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:17:46.802573944-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-rjs","content_hash":"f42e408d61079530cb609a69a77b6f29539b50510c32354c77baab0cbd828518","title":"Implement different-model requirement timeout escalation","description":"## Task
Implement handling when require_different_model is set but no different-model reviewer is available.

## Background (Edge Case 9)
When require_different_model = true, but no agent with a different model is active, the request should escalate after a timeout.

## Configuration
[general]
require_different_model = false  # Optional setting
different_model_timeout = 300    # Escalate after 5 min

## Logic
1. If require_different_model set on request
2. Check active sessions for different models
3. If none available, start timeout countdown
4. After timeout: escalate to human with message

## TUI Display
⚠️ Requires different model (requestor: opus-4.5)
Available reviewers: GreenLake (opus-4.5) ❌ same model

## Files
- internal/core/review.go
- internal/daemon/timeout.go
- internal/tui/request/detail.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Different model requirement enforced
- [ ] Timeout triggers escalation
- [ ] Clear messaging in TUI
- [ ] Human can still approve","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:37.958377893-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:37.958377893-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-rjs","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-jrn.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:37.960547554-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
+{"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-rjs","content_hash":"a50f24e7b432f767331d791ab566b13915b061feb918e6d84083469d07df3f74","title":"Implement different-model requirement timeout escalation","description":"## Task
Implement handling when require_different_model is set but no different-model reviewer is available.

## Background (Edge Case 9)
When require_different_model = true, but no agent with a different model is active, the request should escalate after a timeout.

## Configuration
[general]
require_different_model = false  # Optional setting
different_model_timeout = 300    # Escalate after 5 min

## Logic
1. If require_different_model set on request
2. Check active sessions for different models
3. If none available, start timeout countdown
4. After timeout: escalate to human with message

## TUI Display
⚠️ Requires different model (requestor: opus-4.5)
Available reviewers: GreenLake (opus-4.5) ❌ same model

## Files
- internal/core/review.go
- internal/daemon/timeout.go
- internal/tui/request/detail.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Different model requirement enforced
- [ ] Timeout triggers escalation
- [ ] Clear messaging in TUI
- [ ] Human can still approve","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:37.958377893-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:31:35.453692984-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-rjs","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-jrn.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:37.960547554-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-tzt","content_hash":"56fff8e7d32244aef1225b0b72bbc35917d1127b89a9573e0a98abc8f6774892","title":"Implement analytics/learning mode with execution outcomes","description":"## Task
Implement the analytics and learning features using execution_outcomes table.

## Background (from Creative Addition #7)
Track historical patterns to surface insights:
- Which commands get approved vs rejected
- Which approved commands caused subsequent problems
- Which agents have high rejection rates
- Time-to-approval metrics

## execution_outcomes Table (already in schema)
- request_id
- caused_problems (bool)
- problem_description
- human_rating (1-5)
- human_notes

## Features
1. After execution, prompt for outcome feedback (optional)
2. CLI command: slb outcome <request-id> --problems --description '...'
3. Dashboard stats panel showing metrics
4. Suggest pattern refinements based on history

## Files
- internal/db/outcomes.go
- internal/cli/outcome.go
- internal/tui/dashboard/stats.go (enhance)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Outcomes can be recorded
- [ ] Stats calculated correctly
- [ ] TUI shows metrics
- [ ] Pattern suggestions generated","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:25.021142673-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:30:25.821911455-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T20:30:25.821911455-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-tzt","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-kb5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:25.023321712-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z","content_hash":"9b0a7e3b906cd5f037c519d0ed7b228359390859305c1675b0670f7e4c2248c3","title":"EPIC: Project Foundation & Build Infrastructure","description":"## Overview
Establish the foundational Go project structure following the NTM-proven architecture. This epic covers the initial setup that all other work depends on.

## Background & Rationale
The plan specifies Go 1.25 with the Charmbracelet ecosystem (Bubble Tea, Bubbles, Lip Gloss, Glamour). We're using modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go, no cgo) for simpler cross-compilation. This foundation must be rock-solid since everything else builds on it.

## Key Decisions (from PLAN_TO_MAKE_SLB.md v2.0.0)
- Single binary architecture (daemon is a subprocess, not separate binary)
- Pure Go SQLite (no cgo dependency)
- Charmbracelet ecosystem for TUI excellence
- GoReleaser for cross-platform distribution
- CI/CD via GitHub Actions

## Success Criteria
1. `go build ./...` succeeds
2. Project structure matches plan layout
3. GoReleaser config produces Linux/macOS/Windows binaries
4. CI pipeline runs lint, test, build

## Files Created
- go.mod, go.sum
- cmd/slb/main.go
- Makefile
- .goreleaser.yaml
- .github/workflows/ci.yml, release.yml
- scripts/install.sh","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:11:04.39081558-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:26:46.795848726-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:26:46.795848726-06:00","source_repo":"."}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z.1","content_hash":"3debcfe75f0452e25218a51cf164344706f57b61947ccd96c087afda036282a1","title":"Initialize Go module and project structure","description":"## Task
Create the Go module and directory structure as specified in the plan.

## Implementation Details

module github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb

### Directory Structure

- internal/cli/

- internal/core/
- internal/tui/
- internal/git/

- internal/utils/

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `go mod init` succeeds
- [ ] All dependencies in go.sum
- [ ] `go build ./...` compiles (with stubs)
- [ ] Directory structure matches plan","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:15:32.279833442-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:22:33.160404689-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:22:33.160404689-06:00","source_repo":"."}
